query:
-- Confirm the three records are now suppressed
SELECT id, name, suppressed FROM projects WHERE id IN ('330035','210007','720037');

rows.name: Multiple Large-Scale Renewable Energy Generation Projects (1.2 GW)

stdout:
id	name	suppressed
330035	Delburn Wind Farm	1
210007	Multiple Large-Scale Renewable Energy Generation Projects (1.2 GW)	1
720037	Euroa Station Upgrade (Inland Rail)	1
